subcodes.first_line: O Heaven of Healing! I beseech Thee, by the Sun of Thy grace, and the Moon of Thy loving-kindness, and the Star of Thy bounty, to prescribe healing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سماء الشفاء اسئلک بشمس فضلک و قمر عنایتک و نجم جودک بان تکتب الشفاء من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @symbolism of color and light
